onebutton_setup.message0: Create button %1 Pin %2 Mode %3 Active low %4
onebutton_setup.tooltip: Create and initialize a button object

onebutton_attach_click.tooltip: Execute code when button is clicked

onebutton_attach_double_click.tooltip: Execute code when button is double clicked

onebutton_attach_multi_click.message0: Button %1 is executed when clicked multiple times
onebutton_attach_multi_click.tooltip: Execute code when button is clicked multiple times

onebutton_attach_press.tooltip: Execute code when button is pressed

onebutton_attach_long_press_start.message0: Button %1 is executed when a long press starts
onebutton_attach_long_press_start.tooltip: Execute code when button starts long pressing

onebutton_attach_during_long_press.message0: Button %1 is executed during long press
onebutton_attach_during_long_press.tooltip: Execute code when button is long pressed

onebutton_attach_long_press_stop.message0: Button %1 is executed when the long press ends
onebutton_attach_long_press_stop.tooltip: Execute code when button long press ends

onebutton_set_press_ms.message0: Button %1 Set long press time %2 milliseconds

onebutton_set_long_press_interval_ms.message0: Button %1 Set long press interval %2 milliseconds
onebutton_set_long_press_interval_ms.tooltip: Set the callback interval during long press (milliseconds)

onebutton_is_long_pressed.tooltip: Check if the button is being long pressed

onebutton_get_number_clicks.message0: Button %1 gets the number of clicks
onebutton_get_number_clicks.tooltip: Get the number of clicks on a button
